'''Masterra''', originally known as '''Ord Masterra''', was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Hertae sector/Legends|Hertae sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].

==History==
Ord Masterra was colonized by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]] sometime before the [[Pius Dea Era]].<ref name="TEGtW" /> Masterra was also the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Sarin Virgilio]].<ref name="Dark Force Rising" />

{{Planet-stub}}
